title: thelymitra atronitida
intro: Thelymitra atronitida, also known as the Night-fragrant Sun Orchid, is a species of orchid that is native to the southwestern regions of Western Australia. The plant is known for its unique flowers that emit a strong fragrance at night, attracting pollinators. The Night-fragrant Sun Orchid has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. Herbal preparations of Thelymitra atronitida include infusions and decoctions, which can be used to promote wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems.
